title: Implement Unsloth training script: load Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct 4-bit, LoRA rank 16
completion_summary: trainer/ Python package (apprentice-trainer, hatchling build, uv-managed) with src/apprentice_trainer/train.py as the Unsloth QLoRA entrypoint. Defaults: unsloth/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-bnb-4bit + LoRA rank 16. SFTTrainer + TRL + adamw_8bit; bf16 auto on Ampere+, fp16 fallback. target_modules covers all 7 attn+ffn projections. Reads dataset-builder's gzipped JSONL (train.jsonl.gz, optional val.jsonl.gz), applies qwen-2.5 chat template via Unsloth's get_chat_template, saves LoRA adapter to <output_dir>/lora-adapter. JSON log style matches observer/detector/dataset-builder (taskName + Python 3.12 LogRecord noise filtered). --check-only path validates args + dataset structure without CUDA so CPU-only hosts can verify scaffolding. 8 pytest tests pass on CPU: dataset loading variants, check-only exit codes, parser defaults match acceptance (lora_rank=16, base_model contains 'Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct'), JSON formatter excludes builtin noise. Full GPU smoke test ('Training runs without error on 25 test pairs') deferred to the 4060 Mobile/Max-Q laptop or RunPod A100 — this host has no CUDA. Deliverables: trainer/pyproject.toml, trainer/README.md, trainer/.gitignore, trainer/src/apprentice_trainer/{__init__,train}.py, trainer/tests/test_train.py.
acceptance_criteria: Training runs without error on 25 test pairs
deliverables: Unsloth training script with LoRA config
